ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or individual behind the project */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Short description of the project */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Amount pledged to the project */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers who pledged to the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the project's funding goal and pledges */,
  "launched_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was launched */,
  "deadline" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project's funding period ends */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is in the spotlight */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the project */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, suspended, completed) */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the project */,
  "last_updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project details were last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's main image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's promotional video */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., all-or-nothing, flexible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category this subcategory belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the backer is supporting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "pledge_amount" INTEGER /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the backer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the pledge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the backer account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the backer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the update is for */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the update */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the update */,
  "posted_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the update was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the update */,
  "last_updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the comment is on */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the backer who posted the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "posted_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the comment was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the comment */,
  "last_updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project offering the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "pledge_amount" INTEGER /* Minimum pledge amount required to receive the reward */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Number of available reward units */,
  "estimated_delivery" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the reward */,
  "last_updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the reward information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the backer making the payment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the payment is for */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the payment */,
  "payment_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "last_updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the payment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff pick */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that has been picked */,
  "picked_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was picked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the pick */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for picking the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_picks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_picks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spotlights" (
  "spotlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spotlight feature */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that is featured */,
  "featured_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was featured */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who featured the project */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for featuring the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spotlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spotlights_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spotlights_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
